arts.ttl: Arsenal 'suffer major transfer blow' as top forward target Nico Williams drops hint over his future
arts.sum: Athletic Bilbao attacker Nico Williams - linked with Arsenal and Barcelona - suggests that he wants to spend at least one more season at San Mames.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer target Nico Williams clears his future with Champions League ambition
arts.sum: Arsenal’s chances of signing Athletic Bilbao winger Nico Williams have been dealt a major blow. The Spaniard, who was part of Spain’s Euro 2024 winning team last year, has caught the attention of Arsenal and some other big clubs with his consistent performances for his club and country. Williams has emerged as one of La […] The post Arsenal transfer target Nico Williams clears his future with Champions League ambition appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano announces Dean Huijsen transfer amid Arsenal, Chelsea, Liverpool and Real Madrid links
arts.sum: Real Madrid have been heavily linked with Huijsen, and it appears to be his dream move, but Los Blancos have yet to decide whether they will actually look to add a centre-back this summer, which has given Premier League clubs an advantage. Fabrizio Romano has confirmed that Dean Huijsen will likely stay in the Premier League this summer.

arts.ttl: What Real Madrid have now done in talks to sign Zubimendi as Berta thinks he'll sign for Arsenal - journalist
Real Madrid Predicted Lineup vs. Athletic Bilbao: La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid will be without Kylian Mbappé when they take on Athletic Bilbao in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Athletic Club: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Athletic Club in La Liga on Sunday night. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Jakub Kiwior Arsenal exit discussed as 'suspect' claim made after Real Madrid heroics
arts.sum: Arsenal journalist Charles Watts discusses Jakub Kiwior's future at the club after his heroic performances against Real Madrid in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: "We want to continue in the fight for LaLiga"
arts.sum: We're all hurting, as are the fans, after being knocked out of such an important competition where the club has enjoyed great success in recent years, but these things happen in football. We've had time to prepare and we want to continue in the fight for LaLiga tomorrow."

arts.ttl: Real Madrid’s predicted XI to face Athletic Club
arts.sum: An insight into the group of players expected to be made use of by Real Madrid in the club’s upcoming meeting with Athletic Club has been provided. Real, of course,…

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti set to leave Real Madrid with favourite replacement named
arts.sum: A change in manager is all but assured at La Liga giants Real Madrid upon the close of the campaign. That’s according to the reliable David Ornstein and Mario Cortegana…
